_query: queries/cs-top-clients.redshift.sql (rankings) + queries/cs-pattern-classifier.redshift.sql v4 (11 categories: added photo_required + quote_required from Rockstar deep-dive 2026-07-07)
_scope: Live clients (company_status_type_id = 4) with >=500 POs in last 12 months. Ranked by rejection_rate_pct. Pattern field classifies rejection-note text into duplicate / coaching / policy / ownership / mixed / insufficient.
_notes: This is the CS Toolkit's core targeting list. Top of table = highest CSM leverage per outreach hour.
EPC Real Estate Group is a massive outlier — 45.5% rejection rate is 2.5x the next client and >8x the suite average of ~3%.
IRT rejects only 8.4% but is the biggest volume — 9,502 rejected POs = the largest absolute waste in the book.
Pattern classifier v4 (2026-07-07): 11 tracked categories. Added photo_required + quote_required based on Rockstar deep-dive.

MAJOR v4 finding: photo_required is a portfolio-wide pattern with ~765+ events across 12+ clients (IRT 228, Birchstone 227, Rockstar 149, Ginkgo 94, Kettler 47). Second-largest tracked category after coaching. Combined with chargeback (~340) and quote (~165), doc-attachment as a superclass = ~1,270 events across top-25 = strongest cross-client pattern in the entire dataset.

v4 reclassifications: Birchstone (17651): coaching-heavy → mixed (photo 227 now #2 after coaching 176 — 4-way split). Kettler (16991): insufficient → photo-required (47 events, 64% of classified). Ginkgo (101084): coaching-heavy → mixed (photo 94 emerges as sub-pattern). Cardinal Group Mgmt (100880): coaching-heavy → mixed (quote emerges as sub-pattern).

pattern_legend.coaching-heavy: Rejection notes are approver corrections (GL codes, unit numbers, supporting docs). Product-fixable via entry-form validation. Design partner candidate.
pattern_legend.duplicate-heavy: Rejection notes are 'duplicate PO' or 'invoice already entered'. Product-fixable via create-time duplicate detection.
pattern_legend.policy-heavy: Rejection notes indicate client has decided not to use POs (or a portfolio of theirs hasn't). Not a product problem — CSM conversation about workflow alignment.
pattern_legend.ownership-heavy: Rejection notes indicate property ownership changes (community sold, no longer manage). Data hygiene / property lifecycle problem.
pattern_legend.budget-guardrail: Rejection notes reference budget alignment (over budget, list savings, budget details, overage). Advanced Budgeting integration territory.
pattern_legend.turn-timing: Rejection notes cite missing make-ready / move-out / notice dates. Turn workflow integration territory.
pattern_legend.not-needed: Rejection notes indicate PO wasn't necessary (already covered by contract, service not needed). Active-contract awareness at PO entry.
pattern_legend.post-month: Rejection notes cite accounting period issues (post month passed, wrong period). Better default period selection at entry.
pattern_legend.chargeback-recovery: Rejection notes ask for chargeback / resident bill-back on turn/damage POs. v3 category from Incore deep-dive. Also present at Rockstar (155 events with v4 FMO patterns), IRT (32), Forthright (15). CBR field + FMO attachment requirement at PO entry.
pattern_legend.photo-required: NEW v4 — Rejection notes cite missing photos on turn/damage POs. Surfaced at Rockstar deep-dive. Cross-portfolio: 765+ events across 12+ clients. IRT 228, Birchstone 227, Rockstar 149, Ginkgo 94, Kettler 47. Highest-volume single category after coaching.
pattern_legend.quote-required: NEW v4 — Rejection notes cite missing quotes/estimates. Surfaced at Rockstar deep-dive. Present at Rockstar 81, Birchstone 40, Cardinal 17, IRT 10. Applies to POs above a client-configurable threshold.
pattern_legend.mixed: Multiple patterns present, no single dominant one. Top category < 60% of classified signal. Deep-dive recommended before outreach.
pattern_legend.insufficient signal: Top category is < 5% of the client's total rejections, or no classifier matches at all. Approvers likely write free-form notes. Deep-dive required.

rankings.company_name: EPC Real Estate Group, LLC dba EPC Living
rankings.cs_theme: Systemic workflow break — investigate approver routing
rankings.pattern_note: 191 rejections cite 'do not use POs' vs. 90 duplicate mentions — 5 KC-area properties opted out of POs. Deep-dive available.

rankings.cs_theme: Elevated — likely coding or routing pattern
rankings.pattern_note: 47 of 76 classified rejections are photo_required (62%). Top-3: 47 photo_required + 14 duplicate + 5 coaching. Classifier hit rate 19.1% of 398 total.
26 of 30 classified rejections are coaching (87%). Top-3: 26 coaching + 2 budget_guardrail + 1 photo_required. Classifier hit rate 6.8% of 444 total.

rankings.cs_theme: High volume + high rate — biggest quick-win $
rankings.pattern_note: 849 of 859 classified rejections (98.8%) are coaching notes. Single approver (user 234392, Accountant) does 90% of rejections. Design partner candidate. Deep-dive available.
75 of 111 classified rejections are coaching (68%). Top-3: 75 coaching + 17 quote_required + 14 duplicate. Classifier hit rate 11.0% of 1011 total.
Top category "duplicate" is only 29/739 = 3.9% of total rejections. Below 5% signal floor.

rankings.cs_theme: NEW CBR pattern + volume drop — CSM investigate first
rankings.pattern_note: Deep-dive confirmed coaching-heavy but surfaces a NEW sub-pattern: CBR (Chargeback Recovery) — 96 events (17% of classified). Also: VP + 2 PMs do 96% of rejections (VP alone at 46%). PO volume DOWN 52% year-over-year (Jul 2025 1,211 → Jun 2026 578) — CSM should investigate cause before framing product-value pitch. Property split: 5 properties at 15-26% rate, 5 properties at 0.1-3.5%. Deep-dive available.
Top category "coaching" is only 14/1188 = 1.2% of total rejections. Below 5% signal floor.

rankings.cs_theme: Student housing complexity — likely GL misalignment
rankings.pattern_note: 211 of 341 classified rejections are ownership_changed (62%). Top-3: 211 ownership_changed + 67 duplicate + 23 coaching. Classifier hit rate 31.8% of 1071 total.

rankings.cs_theme: Chargeback-heavy — SECOND-LARGEST CBR client (design partner candidate)
rankings.pattern_note: [v4 classifier: mixed] [v3 classifier: chargeback-recovery] Deep-dive 2026-07-07 revealed the real pattern is broader — 52% of Rockstar's 946 first-rejections are 'you forgot to attach something' (photos 226 events, FMO/chargeback 264, quotes 125). Volume up 4.1x in 10 months (348→1,410 POs/mo). User 75945 = CBR gatekeeper (58% of their 350 rejections are FMO/chargeback). Turn contractors show 37-66% CBR concentration (Pro-Tex, Real Floors, PCS, JNM, Majestic). 10 of 22 properties actively run chargeback; the other 12 don't — validation needs property-level opt-in (same lesson as Incore). Cross-vocabulary validation of Incore's CBR pattern. STRONG DESIGN PARTNER — scaling client, two natural champions (75945 for CBR, 75971 for photos/quotes). See knowledge/csm-quick-wins/rockstar-capital/.
45 of 46 classified rejections are coaching (98%). Top-3: 45 coaching + 1 quote_required. Classifier hit rate 30.9% of 149 total.
Top category "chargeback_recovery" is only 1/59 = 1.7% of total rejections. Below 5% signal floor.

rankings.cs_theme: LARGEST VOLUME — 9,502 rejected POs = biggest $ recovery opportunity in the book
rankings.pattern_note: [v2 classifier: mixed] Deep-dive revealed 4-pattern shape: 350 duplicate + 261 GL coding + 199 budget-guardrail (NEW — Advanced Budgeting integration story) + 180 turn/timing dates (NEW). Multi-tier approval org — 8 Regional Managers do 51% of rejections. Design-partner candidate, not rescue account. Deep-dive available.
Top-3: 69 duplicate + 42 coaching + 10 not_needed. Top category "duplicate" is 56% of 124 classified (< 60% dominance threshold). Multi-pattern client — deep-dive to disambiguate.
22 of 36 classified rejections are policy (61%). Top-3: 22 policy + 12 duplicate + 2 not_needed. Classifier hit rate 26.7% of 135 total.

85 of 131 classified rejections are coaching (65%). Top-3: 85 coaching + 38 budget_guardrail + 6 duplicate. Classifier hit rate 14.1% of 927 total.

rankings.cs_theme: Enterprise — volume alone puts them on radar
rankings.pattern_note: Top-3: 227 photo_required + 176 coaching + 172 duplicate. Top category "photo_required" is 32% of 702 classified (< 60% dominance threshold). Multi-pattern client — deep-dive to disambiguate.
Top category "duplicate" is only 13/327 = 4.0% of total rejections. Below 5% signal floor.

Deep-dive confirmed: 30 of 41 first-rejections (73%) are explicit duplicate PO language, 7 naming 'Wyatt' as the duplicate creator. Single approver LH (user 19547) does 83% of rejections. Single property 'The St James' (NYC) does 98%. Episodic Aug-Sep 2025 spike already resolved via coaching. IDEAL alpha design partner for duplicate detection — small blast radius, unambiguous signal, motivated approver. Deep-dive available.
376 of 381 classified rejections are coaching (99%). Top-3: 376 coaching + 2 duplicate + 1 turn_timing. Classifier hit rate 22.9% of 1662 total.
